parameters.jsCode: const input = $input.first().json; const orders = input.orders || [input]; const processed = orders.map((o) => { const carrier = o.carrier || 'Bosta'; const trackingNum = o.trackingNumber || o.tracking_number || ''; const status = o.status || 'pending'; const daysInTransit = parseInt(o.daysInTransit) || 0; const city = o.city || 'Cairo'; const isDelayed = daysInTransit > 3 && status !== 'delivered'; const isFailed = status === 'failed_delivery' || status === 'returned'; const needsAttention = isDelayed || isFailed; const avgDeliveryDays = carrier === 'Bosta' ? 2.1 : carrier === 'Aramex' ? 2.4 : 2.8; const estimatedDelivery = daysInTransit >= avgDeliveryDays ? 'overdue' : daysInTransit >= avgDeliveryDays * 0.7 ? 'soon' : 'on_track'; return { orderId: o.orderId || o.order_id || o.id, carrier, trackingNumber: trackingNum, status, city, daysInTransit, isDelayed, isFailed, needsAttention, estimatedDelivery, codAmount: o.codAmount || o.amount || 0, alertLevel: isFailed ? 'critical' : isDelayed ? 'warning' : 'normal' }; }); return [{json:{ orders: processed, summary: { total: processed.length, delivered: processed.filter(o => o.status === 'delivered').length, delayed: processed.filter(o => o.isDelayed).length, failed: processed.filter(o => o.isFailed).length, attention: processed.filter(o => o.needsAttention).length, codAtRisk: processed.filter(o => o.needsAttention).reduce((s, o) => s + o.codAmount, 0) }, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }}];

parts.text: Generate shipping insights in English for: Total orders: {{ $json.summary.total }}, Delivered: {{ $json.summary.delivered }}, Delayed: {{ $json.summary.delayed }}, Failed: {{ $json.summary.failed }}, COD at risk: EGP {{ $json.summary.codAtRisk }}. Provide: 1 key insight, 1 recommendation, 1 alert if needed. Keep under 3 sentences.

messages.content: Generate brief shipping analytics insights in English.
Orders: {{ $json.summary.total }}, Delivered: {{ $json.summary.delivered }}, Delayed: {{ $json.summary.delayed }}, Failed: {{ $json.summary.failed }}, COD at risk: EGP {{ $json.summary.codAtRisk }}

parameters.jsCode: const gemini = $input.all().find(n => n.json?.candidates)?.json; const groq = $input.all().find(n => n.json?.choices)?.json; const ctx = $('Process').first().json; let insight = ''; let provider = 'mock'; if (gemini?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts?.[0]?.text) { insight = gemini.candidates[0].content.parts[0].text; provider = 'gemini'; } else if (groq?.choices?.[0]?.message?.content) { insight = groq.choices[0].message.content; provider = 'groq'; } else { const s = ctx.summary; insight = `Shipping: ${s.delivered}/${s.total} delivered. ${s.delayed} delayed, ${s.failed} failed. COD at risk: EGP ${s.codAtRisk}.`; if (s.delayed > 0) insight += ' Recommend following up with carriers.'; if (s.failed > 0) insight += ' Urgent: Review failed deliveries for recovery.'; } return [{json:{ success: true, ...ctx, aiInsight: insight, provider, alerts: ctx.orders.filter((o) => o.needsAttention).map((o) => ({ orderId: o.orderId, level: o.alertLevel, message: o.isFailed ? 'Delivery failed - initiate recovery' : `Delayed ${o.daysInTransit} days - follow up ${o.carrier}` })), processedAt: new Date().toISOString() }}];
